chat.startDesc: Ask me anything about the document!
chat.error: Failed to get response. Please try again.
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
chat.guestNotice: Guest mode: Chat history won't be saved

aiActions.title: AI Assistant
aiActions.subtitle: Powered by advanced AI
aiActions.descSummary: Get a concise summary of the entire document.
aiActions.descExplanation: Enter a topic or concept from the document to get a detailed explanation.
aiActions.errorInput: Please enter a concept to explain.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your learning progress and activity
dashboard.readingProfileDesc: Reading comprehension assessment based on Barrett's Taxonomy
dashboard.levelLiteralDesc: Extract information directly stated in the text
dashboard.levelInferentialDesc: Read between the lines, make inferences and predictions
dashboard.practiceTip: Create new quizzes at this level to improve your skills.
dashboard.startLearning: Start reading documents or taking quizzes to see statistics!

documents.title: My Documents
documents.subtitle: Manage and organize your learning materials
documents.emptyStateDesc: Get started by uploading your first PDF document to begin learning.
documents.errorUpload: Please provide a title and select a file.
documents.modalUploadDesc: Add a PDF document to your library
documents.modalDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the document: "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
documents.guestSubtitle: Upload and manage your PDF documents
documents.guestEmptyDesc: Upload your first PDF to start learning. Documents are stored for 24 hours.
documents.guestWarningTitle: Guest Mode - Documents expire in 24 hours
documents.guestWarningDesc: Your uploaded documents will be automatically deleted after 24 hours. Register to save them permanently.
documents.guestExpiryDesc: This document will be automatically deleted on {{expiresAt}}. Register to save it permanently.
documents.guestViewHint: You are viewing as a guest. Register to save documents permanently.

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.emptyStateDesc: Generate flashcards from your document to start learning and reinforce your knowledge.
flashcards.emptyStateListDesc: You haven't generated any flashcard yet. Go to a document to create your first set.
flashcards.errorFetchAll: Failed to fetch all flashcard sets.
flashcards.modalDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this flashcard set? This action cannot be undone and all cards will be permanently removed.
flashcards.modalDeleteDescPage: Are you sure you want to delete all flashcards for this document? This action cannot be undone.

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.emptyStateDesc: Generate a quiz from your document to test your knowledge.
quizzes.quizNotFound: Quiz not found or has no questions.
quizzes.modalDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the quiz: "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

auth.loginSub: Sign in to continue your journey

auth.resetDesc: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.checkEmailDesc: We've sent password reset instructions to your email.

auth.errorRegister: Failed to register. Please try again.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
auth.footerPolicy: By continuing, you agree to our Term & Privacy Policy

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

landing.heroSubtitle: Understand English PDF documents faster with AI-powered tools. Upload, chat, and learn - no signup needed.
landing.featureUploadDesc: Upload your documents and let AI extract and process the content automatically.
landing.featureChatDesc: Ask questions about your documents and get instant, accurate answers.
landing.featureAIDesc: Generate summaries and explanations instantly with AI assistance.
landing.premiumSubtitle: Register for free to access flashcards, quizzes, and save your documents permanently.
landing.featureFlashcardsDesc: AI automatically creates flashcards from document content for effective review.
landing.featureQuizzesDesc: Create quizzes automatically and track your learning progress.
landing.whyChooseSubtitle: Powerful AI learning tool, easy to use and completely free
landing.reason1Desc: Process documents and create learning content in seconds.
landing.reason2Desc: AI trained to provide accurate and reliable information.
landing.reason3Desc: Learn and adapt to your learning style.
